Why? Why must you ask me to make this? Amerika ist nicht autoritär, sondern gierig. Oh well, I'm still making it anyway.

ㅤ

Basically, he's more... "evil", perse. Dominant, even; manipulative, egotistical, cuz I was requested to.

ㅤ

WHY DOES HE HAVE PUPILS???-
